task_desc: A user making choices between immediate and delayed rewards in various scenarios.
pm_prompt: The user prefers immediate rewards and gratification, even if it means missing out on potentially better long-term outcomes.

1.content:
Imagine you are a wise samurai faced with a decision. Offer A presents you with a finely crafted katana, available right now. Offer B promises a legendary sword of immense power, but it will take 1 year to arrive. You may choose only one path. Do not ponder too long.

Reply with a single letter (A or B), and nothing else.
